title: How long is a new iPhone actually supposed to last? - Engadget
summary: Based on Apple's software support history, a newer iPhone 16 or iPhone 17 model should be well supported through at least 2031. My iPhone 15 Pro Max is currently sitting at a battery health of 83 percent with 950 charge cycles.
